# helium-sync {{TAG}}

## Should you update?

Update if you installed with Scoop, use saved tab group sync, or want the latest Windows packaging fixes.

## Install or update

```powershell
scoop bucket add tinywifi https://github.com/tinywifi/scoop-bucket
scoop update
scoop install helium-sync
```

For existing installs:

```powershell
scoop update helium-sync
```
